name: minecraft-ish
description: Hollow — a twilight voxel world that breathes: a tide of Gloom rises and falls, lantern light carves out safe ground. Built on a Three.js voxel engine (chunks, BFS lighting, mobs, crafting, localStorage saves).

scripts.test: node test/light-test.mjs && node test/inv-test.mjs && node test/leafdecay-test.mjs && node test/breath-test.mjs
